---
title: "Analysis of Heart Disease"
author: "Wilson Cam"
date: "2024-06-11"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(e1071)
library(nnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

1. Load Data
```{r}
heart = read.csv("/Users/judynei/Downloads/heart.csv")

str(heart)
summary(heart)
colSums(is.na(heart))

heart = na.omit(heart)
```

2. Exploratory Data Analysis
```{r}
cor_matrix = cor(heart)
print(cor_matrix)

cor_target = cor_matrix[,'target']
cor_target = sort(cor_target, decreasing = TRUE)

barplot(cor_target, main = "Correlation of Features with Target", col = 'blue', las = 2)
```

```{r}
oldpeak = ggplot(heart, aes(x = oldpeak)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = 'blue', color = 'black', alpha = 0.7) +
  ggtitle('Oldpeak Distribution')

cp = ggplot(heart, aes(x = factor(cp))) + 
  geom_bar(fill = 'blue', color = 'black', alpha = 0.7) +
  ggtitle('Chest Pain Type Distribution') +
  xlab('Chest Pain Type')

grid.arrange(oldpeak, cp, nrow = 2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(heart, aes(x = age, y = thalach, color = factor(target))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red"), name = "Presence of Heart Disease") +
  labs(title = "Age vs. Maximum Heart Rate Achieved",
       x = "Age",
       y = "Maximum Heart Rate Achieved") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
boxplot(heart, main="Boxplot of Heart Dataset", xlab="Variables", ylab="Values")
```

3. Logistic Regression Model
```{r}
set.seed(1)

heart$target = as.factor(heart$target)

index = createDataPartition(heart$target, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_heart = heart[index, ]
test_heart = heart[-index, ]

preProc = preProcess(train_heart[, -ncol(train_heart)], method = c("center", "scale"))

train_heart_scaled = predict(preProc, train_heart[, -ncol(train_heart)])
test_heart_scaled = predict(preProc, test_heart[, -ncol(test_heart)])

train_heart = cbind(train_heart_scaled, target = train_heart$target)
test_heart = cbind(test_heart_scaled, target = test_heart$target)

log_reg = train(target ~ ., data = train_heart, method = 'glm', family = 'binomial')

summary(log_reg)

log_reg_preds = predict(log_reg, test_heart)
log_reg_prob = predict(log_reg, test_heart, type = "prob")[,2]

confusionMatrix(log_reg_preds, test_heart$target)

roc_curve = roc(test_heart$target, log_reg_prob)
plot(roc_curve, col = "blue", main = "ROC curve")
auc(roc_curve)
```

5. KNN with Selected Predictors
```{r}
perform_knn <- function(predictors, data) {
  
  predictors_data <- data[, c(predictors, "target")]

  set.seed(123)
  train_indices <- sample(1:nrow(predictors_data), 0.8 * nrow(predictors_data))
  train_data <- predictors_data[train_indices, ]
  test_data <- predictors_data[-train_indices, ]

  knn_model <- train(target ~ ., data = train_data, method = "knn")

  predictions <- predict(knn_model, newdata = test_data)

  print(confusionMatrix(predictions, test_data$target))

  accuracy <- mean(predictions == test_data$target)
  print(accuracy)

  probs <- predict(knn_model, newdata = test_data, type = "prob")[,2]
  roc_obj <- roc(test_data$target, probs)

  print(auc(roc_obj))

  plot(roc_obj, main = paste("ROC:", paste(predictors, collapse = ", ")))
}

perform_knn(c("cp", "thalach", "exang", "oldpeak", "ca", "sex"), heart)
perform_knn(c("age", "trestbps", "chol", "fbs", "restecg"), heart)
```

6. K-Means Clustering
```{r}
numeric_cols <- sapply(heart, is.numeric)
numeric_data <- heart[, numeric_cols]

numeric_data_scaled <- as.data.frame(scale(numeric_data))

wss <- (nrow(numeric_data_scaled) - 1) * sum(apply(numeric_data_scaled, 2, var))
for (i in 2:15) {
  wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(numeric_data_scaled, centers = i)$withinss)
}

plot(1:15, wss, type = "b",
     xlab = "Number of Clusters",
     ylab = "Within groups sum of squares")
```

```{r}
set.seed(42)

kmeans_result <- kmeans(numeric_data_scaled, centers = 3, nstart = 25)

heart$cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_result$cluster)

pca <- prcomp(numeric_data_scaled, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
pca_data <- as.data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2])
pca_data$cluster <- heart$cluster

ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "K-means Clustering (PCA Projection)")
```

```{r}
summary(heart$cluster)
aggregate(numeric_data, by = list(heart$cluster), FUN = mean)

table(heart$cluster, heart$sex)
```

```{r}
ggplot(heart, aes(x = cluster, fill = as.factor(sex))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(heart, aes(x = cluster, fill = as.factor(cp))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(heart, aes(x = cluster, y = age, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()
```
